This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Creates an element but doesn't attach it to the DOM.
  assert_equals: Expected only one soft navigation (test_id=dom-not-attached). expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] Doesn't paint because the element is hidden.
  assert_equals: Expected only one soft navigation (test_id=no-paint). expected 1 but got 2
Harness: the test ran to completion.
